calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee Due To Vacancy In Office Following Death Of Trustee [Prob Code Sec 17200(B)(10); 15643(D)]
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for Courtnery Kennett (Petitioner).

The Court granted the Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $325,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
